summary: Updated web-app-deployment.yaml to start scripts/web_app.py (NiceGUI entry point) instead of scripts/web_app_hub.py, preserving all existing service identity, ports, probes, workspace mount, auth Secret, Hub/MCP env vars, grove id conventions, and read-only RBAC. Updated docs/kind-control-plane.md with NiceGUI operator console language, a NiceGUI Local Development section with local run instructions, and a note on the new entry point and health/JSON endpoints. Smoke check uses /api/overview JSON endpoint without model-backed work — no changes needed. Checked off task 1.9.
tasks_completed: 1.9 Update kind manifests, probes, service wiring, lifecycle tasks, and documentation for the NiceGUI web app while preserving existing runtime configuration conventions.
